title: Virtuoso 7.1 regression for SPARQL VALUES
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_values (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_values (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'a', 'ABC'), (2, 'b', 'DEF');
SELECT name, value FROM test_values WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_values WHERE name = 'a');
SELECT name, COALESCE(value, 'NULL') AS value_status FROM test_values;
SELECT name, (CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END) AS bound FROM test_values WHERE id = 2;
key_bug_features: Incorrect binding of multiple variables in SPARQL VALUES
